Jordan Rivera
Senior Backend Engineer

WORK HISTORY
Senior Backend Engineer, Northwind Logistics (2021 - Present)
  - Designed and operated Django/Python services handling order routing for a national logistics network.
  - Migrated the primary datastore to PostgreSQL, cutting query latency by 40%.
  - Led the team's move to Kubernetes on AWS EKS, standardizing deployment across 12 microservices.

Backend Engineer, Fenwick Analytics (2018 - 2021)
  - Built REST APIs in Python (Flask, then Django) serving internal analytics dashboards.
  - Operated production workloads on AWS (EC2, RDS, S3).

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science, State University (2014 - 2018)

SKILLS
Python, Django, PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, AWS, Docker, REST APIs, System Design
